label: Strategy Trial Inspect
description: Inspect one Strategy Trial DAG node, including params, metrics, status, verdict, and linked artifacts.

outputs.name: trial_detail
outputs.description: Trial row with strategy name, params, status, metrics, verdict, lessons, and artifact refs.

failureModes.description: The requested trial id is missing from strategy_trials.
The strategy_trials database is unavailable or PG_URL is not configured.

evidencePolicy: Trial inspect evidence identifies which strategy node and parameter set is being reviewed.
A trial row alone is not promotion evidence.
Do not run destructive trial tests against the live strategy_trials database.
notes: Use this to anchor matrix review tasks to Trial DAG identity.
